Accommodations

Modern & Comfy

Relax in our beautifully appointed rooms, each designed for your comfort with modern amenities and coastal charm.

One Bedroom Suites

Spacious ground-floor unit with kitchenette, living room with sofa bed, dining table, and guest bathroom. Separate bedroom and bathroom with walk-in shower. Small patio with seating.

View Details

One Bedroom Townhouse

Lofted-style unit with kitchenette, living room with sofa bed, dining table, and full bath on the first level. Separate bedroom and bathroom on the second level.

View Details

Food & Drinks

Our Restaurant & Bar

Lunch, dinner, outdoor poolside service in season, live entertainment, comedy, and special events. Come in to relax, eat, and enjoy everything The Loft has to offer.

Reservations: 774-552-2177

Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

Great place to stay. Staff very helpful and pleasant. One of the very few places where the one-bedroom unit has 2 full bathrooms. Beautiful outside pool area with a great restaurant and a fire pit area for night relaxing.

— Angela R.

The Cove has so many amenities! Two outdoor pools, an indoor pool, arcade, and even a restaurant on-site! Choose The Cove, you won't regret it.

— Denise S.

Very nice hotel. Everything is so clean and the pool is a great amenity. The best thing is the restaurant and entertainment at The Loft every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday. Great place to be for a vacation!

— Sara Z.
183 Main St, West Yarmouth, MA 02673
